---
title: "Setup"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
# =========================================================
# ACTL4003 Final Report - Mesothelioma Survival Prediction
# Section 1: Setup
# =========================================================

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE
)

set.seed(4003)

# Core packages
library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)
library(readr)
library(readxl)

# Modelling
library(caret)
library(glmnet)
library(ranger)
library(pROC)

# Utilities
library(Matrix)
library(scales)
library(patchwork)
library(gt)
```

```{r}
# =========================================================
# Section 2: Import data
# =========================================================

# Adjust paths if needed
clinical <- read_tsv("/Users/katz/Desktop/UNi Year 4/Semester 1/Predictive Analytics /Assessments/Project/PAP-Project/data/raw/clinical.tsv", show_col_types = FALSE) %>% clean_names()
exposure <- read_tsv("/Users/katz/Desktop/UNi Year 4/Semester 1/Predictive Analytics /Assessments/Project/PAP-Project/data/raw/exposure.tsv", show_col_types = FALSE) %>% clean_names()
family_history <- read_tsv("/Users/katz/Desktop/UNi Year 4/Semester 1/Predictive Analytics /Assessments/Project/PAP-Project/data/raw/family_history.tsv", show_col_types = FALSE) %>% clean_names()
follow_up <- read_tsv("/Users/katz/Desktop/UNi Year 4/Semester 1/Predictive Analytics /Assessments/Project/PAP-Project/data/raw/follow_up.tsv", show_col_types = FALSE) %>% clean_names()
pathology_detail <- read_tsv("/Users/katz/Desktop/UNi Year 4/Semester 1/Predictive Analytics /Assessments/Project/PAP-Project/data/raw/pathology_detail.tsv", show_col_types = FALSE) %>% clean_names()
sample_sheet <- read_tsv("/Users/katz/Desktop/UNi Year 4/Semester 1/Predictive Analytics /Assessments/Project/PAP-Project/data/raw/gdc_sample_sheet.2026-04-07.tsv", show_col_types = FALSE) %>% clean_names()

expr_raw <- read_csv("/Users/katz/Desktop/UNi Year 4/Semester 1/Predictive Analytics /Assessments/Project/PAP-Project/data/raw/gene_count_matrix_1pass_TCGA.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# Examine structure
# ---------------------------------------------------------
glimpse(clinical)
glimpse(expr_raw)
glimpse(sample_sheet)
```

```{r}
# =========================================================
# Expression matrix processing
# Assumes first column contains gene IDs / gene names
# and remaining columns are TCGA samples
# =========================================================

expr_df <- expr_raw

# Rename first column to gene_id if needed
names(expr_df)[1] <- "gene_id"

# Remove duplicated genes if present
expr_df <- expr_df %>%
  distinct(gene_id, .keep_all = TRUE)

# Convert to matrix with genes in rows, samples in columns
expr_mat <- expr_df %>%
  column_to_rownames("gene_id") %>%
  as.matrix()

# Make sure numeric
storage.mode(expr_mat) <- "numeric"

dim(expr_mat)
expr_mat[1:5, 1:5]
```

```{r}
# =========================================================
# Construct binary survival outcome
# =========================================================

names(clinical)

# Inspect likely survival-related fields
surv_vars <- names(clinical)[str_detect(names(clinical), "days|death|follow|last|vital|submitter")]
surv_vars

# Create a working clinical table
clinical_main <- clinical %>%
  mutate(
    cases_submitter_id = as.character(cases_submitter_id),
    days_to_death = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(demographic_days_to_death)),
    days_to_last_follow_up = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(diagnoses_days_to_last_follow_up)),
    vital_status = demographic_vital_status
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    overall_time = case_when(
      !is.na(days_to_death) ~ days_to_death,
      !is.na(days_to_last_follow_up) ~ days_to_last_follow_up,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    survived_500d = case_when(
      !is.na(overall_time) & overall_time > 500 ~ "Yes",
      !is.na(overall_time) & overall_time <= 500 ~ "No",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    survived_500d = factor(survived_500d, levels = c("No", "Yes"))
  )

table(clinical_main$survived_500d, useNA = "ifany")
summary(clinical_main$overall_time)
```

```{r}
# =========================================================
# Expression sample IDs
# =========================================================

expr_sample_ids <- colnames(expr_mat)

# TCGA style shortening to patient-level IDs if needed
expr_patient_ids <- str_sub(expr_sample_ids, 1, 12)

expr_meta <- tibble(
  expr_sample_id = expr_sample_ids,
  cases_submitter_id = expr_patient_ids
)

head(expr_meta)
```

```{r}
# =========================================================
# Merge clinical outcome with expression metadata
# =========================================================

expr_clin <- expr_meta %>%
  left_join(
    clinical_main %>%
      select(cases_submitter_id, overall_time, survived_500d, vital_status),
    by = "cases_submitter_id"
  )

table(expr_clin$survived_500d, useNA = "ifany")

# Keep only samples with known 500-day survival outcome
expr_clin_complete <- expr_clin %>%
  filter(!is.na(survived_500d))

length(unique(expr_clin_complete$expr_sample_id))
table(expr_clin_complete$survived_500d)
```

```{r}
# =========================================================
# Restrict expression matrix to complete outcome cases
# =========================================================

expr_mat_model <- expr_mat[, expr_clin_complete$expr_sample_id, drop = FALSE]

# transpose to samples x genes for modelling
x_expr <- t(expr_mat_model) %>% as.data.frame()
y_expr <- expr_clin_complete$survived_500d

dim(x_expr)
table(y_expr)
```
